lesson.discoveryDesc: Understand real customer needs through questioning
lesson.presentationDesc: Clearly communicate product value and advantages
lesson.objectionDesc: Effectively address customer concerns and objections
lesson.closingDesc: Seize the right moment to close the deal
lesson.fullCycleDesc: Complete journey from first contact to closing
lesson.enterpriseDesc: Navigate complex sales with multiple stakeholders
lesson.hellDesc: Deal with the most demanding clients

dashboard.salesAssistantHint: What did the customer say? Get scripts now
dashboard.salesAssistantDesc: Enter customer's exact words to generate ready-to-use scripts
dashboard.salesAssistantSubdesc: Supports objection handling, competitor comparison, price negotiation and more
dashboard.weakAreaDesc: Practicing this skill can significantly improve your close rate
dashboard.emptyDesc: Choose a scenario and begin your sales skill journey

practicePage.title: AI Practice
practicePage.setupDesc: Choose a scenario and start practicing with an AI customer
practicePage.analyzingDesc: Evaluating your sales skills across 8 dimensions
practicePage.reportFailed: Report generation failed, but you can still view the detailed report
practicePage.aiServiceFailedDesc: Unable to connect to AI practice service, please try again later
practicePage.defaultGreeting: Hello, how can I help you?
practicePage.useScript: Complete a sales conversation using scripts
practicePage.recommendFramework: Based on your scenario, recommended framework: "{{name}}"

coldCall.title: Cold Call
coldCall.desc: First contact with a potential customer to make a good impression
coldCall.profile: Busy mid-level manager, defensive against unknown callers

needsAnalysis.title: Needs Analysis
needsAnalysis.desc: Deep dive into customer pain points and real needs
needsAnalysis.greeting: We do have some issues to solve. Tell me about your product first.
needsAnalysis.profile: Customer with clear problems but unsure about solutions

productDemo.title: Product Demo
productDemo.desc: Showcase product features and value to the customer
productDemo.greeting: I'm quite interested in your product. Let's see a demo.
productDemo.profile: Technical lead interested but worried about implementation risks

priceNegotiation.title: Price Negotiation
priceNegotiation.desc: Customer has price objections, needs value building
priceNegotiation.greeting: Your quote is too high. Can you offer a lower price?
priceNegotiation.profile: Price-sensitive customer, good at comparing prices

termsNegotiation.title: Terms Negotiation
termsNegotiation.desc: Contract terms, payment methods, and other details
termsNegotiation.greeting: We need to discuss the contract terms. There are several points we can't accept.
termsNegotiation.profile: Legal team involved, strict on terms

urgencyClose.title: Urgency Close
urgencyClose.desc: Create urgency to push the customer to decide quickly
urgencyClose.greeting: The proposal looks good, but I need more time to think about it.

referralVisit.title: Referral Visit
referralVisit.desc: Visit a new customer through an existing client's introduction
referralVisit.greeting: Hi, Old Wang mentioned you. Tell me about your services.
referralVisit.profile: Trusts the referrer, willing to learn but cautious

followUp.title: Follow-up
followUp.desc: Maintain relationship and discover new needs
followUp.greeting: Hi, we discussed the previous matter internally.

solutionProposal.title: Solution Proposal
solutionProposal.greeting: I've reviewed the proposal, but I still need to compare with other vendors.
solutionProposal.profile: Decision-maker comparing multiple options, focused on ROI

finalObjection.title: Final Objection
finalObjection.desc: Handle the last concerns before closing
finalObjection.greeting: Actually, I have one more concern...
finalObjection.profile: About to sign but has final worries

complaintHandling.title: Complaint Handling
complaintHandling.desc: Handle customer complaints and recover the relationship
complaintHandling.greeting: Your product is so disappointing! I want to file a complaint!

seaLazada.title: Lazada Seller Onboarding
seaLazada.desc: Recommend Lazada platform services to Chinese sellers
seaLazada.greeting: We want to enter the Southeast Asian market, but don't know much about Lazada. Can you explain?
seaLazada.profile: Chinese e-commerce seller looking to expand to Southeast Asia

seaSaasLocal.title: Localized SaaS Sales
seaSaasLocal.desc: Sell SaaS products to Southeast Asian enterprises
seaSaasLocal.greeting: Where are your data centers? Do you comply with Singapore's PDPA?
seaSaasLocal.profile: IT manager at a Singapore enterprise

seaPayment.title: Cross-border Payment
seaPayment.desc: Promote local Southeast Asian payment methods to e-commerce sellers
seaPayment.greeting: Our current payment method has very low success rates in Southeast Asia. Customers often can't pay.

reviewPage.title: Daily Review
reviewPage.subtitle: Upload today's conversations, AI generates a one-click review report to track your growth

reviewPage.analyzingDesc: Deep evaluation across 8 dimensions including needs discovery, objection handling, and closing ability
reviewPage.defaultSummary: AI analysis complete. Please see the dimension scores below.

teamPage.subtitle: Manage team dashboard, task assignments, and script sharing

analyticsPage.title: Analytics
analyticsPage.subtitle: Track your sales skill growth trajectory

knowledgePage.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgePage.subtitle: Manage sales knowledge assets. General knowledge is maintained by admins, company knowledge is configured by you
knowledgePage.privacyDesc: Uploaded files are only used to generate better scripts for you. The platform cannot view your content. You can permanently delete all uploaded data at any time from the "Data Rights" page.
knowledgePage.generalKnowledgeDesc: 📚 General knowledge is maintained by admins, including industry sales strategies, objection handling methodologies, shared across all users

pluginPage.title: Industry Plugins
pluginPage.subtitle: Browse and install industry plugin packages, switch between sales scenarios with one click

adminPage.title: Admin Panel
adminPage.subtitle: Data statistics, knowledge base management, model configuration, plugin management, and system settings
adminPage.accessDenied: Admin panel is only accessible to administrators
adminPage.accessDeniedDesc: Please contact an admin for access
adminPage.loadFailedDesc: Please refresh the page and try again
